blocks.content: Shirone was unable to move.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: His body felt stiff, like a wooden plank, as if being drawn into some unseen vortex.
A blue light flowed like electricity through wires, and then, suddenly, darkness enveloped him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is the event starting?
When had he closed his eyes?
Boom. Boom.
Thunder echoed as Shirone opened his eyes, revealing a sky covered in murky clouds, reminiscent of filthy water.
Cold raindrops fell, half-closing his eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hehehe! Found it! Found the stray mutt!
A voice came from beneath him.
Shirone tried to lift his head, but a chain around his neck held him down.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm tied up.
His entire body was wrapped in thick chains, pinned to a wooden board.
A man walked through the mud, holding the chains slung over his shoulder, muttering angrily.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Damn bastards. They dare ignore my achievements?
As the man grumbled, Shirone assessed his own mental state.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hmm, as expected. Neither magic nor incarnation works.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It wasn't surprising—incarnation didn't allow for falsehoods. He had chosen this path, so there was no rejection from his consciousness.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I could probably break this, though.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If he committed himself with the determination of Yahweh's level, it seemed possible to destroy the chains.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Still, it's some serious coding. Whoever made this outclasses Shura.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He idly wondered how the man would react if he broke free.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Not that I'd get to see it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Breaking free would likely stop the event itself, derailing the entire scenario.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Where are you taking me?
Suddenly, Shirone's mouth moved on its own.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let me go, you bastard!
The man turned his head.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Hehehe! Awake now? You're lucky. You're going to live forever soon.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No! Send me back to where I came from!

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Too late for that. Why'd you crawl into the scrapyard? Should've stayed inside like the little rat you are.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Aaah! Aaah!
Shirone shook his head, thrashing around.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This feels... dizzying.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Though his mind felt calm, the lack of control over his vision was unsettling.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haah, haah!
Even the terrified gasps coming from his mouth didn't feel like his own.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: We're here. We're finally here.
From his grounded perspective, Shirone saw a door swing open and soon found himself inside, looking up at a ceiling.
He was on a narrow surgical table, tilted at an incline.
For the first time, he saw the man's face—torn, ragged skin barely clinging to the frame of a mechanical humanoid with glowing blue eyes.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Do you know what this is?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No idea.
Shirone wanted to answer but found his body trembling involuntarily.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: It's a high gear. A semi-permanent power unit. With this, you can live forever.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No! Don't!
Ignoring Shirone's protests, the man turned to a table.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Let me introduce myself. I'm Dr. Martin. Developer of the high gear and a tragic genius. Just how much of a genius? I've only made one mistake in my entire life. But that one mistake left me like this.
From the table, Martin picked up a half-rusted axe.
Screeetch.
The sound of the axe being sharpened echoed.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: And what was that mistake? Giving immortality to trash like you. Damn it. Immortality can't be revoked. The high gear is a gift from God—it doesn't require food or sleep as long as there's sunlight.

What I didn't anticipate was how worthless you all are. Back when I cured incurable diseases and developed an elixir to stop aging, they worshipped me like a god. Statues of me were erected everywhere. But once I gave them immortality...
Martin snapped his head around, his voice seething with anger.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: They wanted to kill me, to monopolize my technology and become new gods themselves. So they exiled me, destroyed me. But I didn't give up. Those who defy God will face divine punishment. Hehehe! Yes, punishment.
Caressing the axe handle lovingly, Martin's face twisted into a grin of madness.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: I stole the sun from them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone had so many questions, but his body wouldn't respond.
Martin had finished his preparations.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: The high gear will replace your heart. Billions of nanomachines will circulate through your bloodstream, eventually overtaking your brain. You'll lose arms? No problem. Attach an excavator if you want. No immune response, nothing.
Martin placed the high gear on the table. Its lens-like grooves emitted a rhythmic blue glow, though it didn't beat like a heart.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm human! I'm not some monster, you damn bastard!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The uncharacteristic outburst felt alien to Shirone, likely part of the event script.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Well then, let's begin. Hehehe! Hahaha!
Martin spat on his palm and gripped the axe with both hands, raising it high.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Your heart is mine!
Just as Martin charged, Shirone's scripted scream erupted.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No! Noooo—
Before his scream ended, the axe plunged toward Shirone's abdomen.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh! A sensation like his heart dropping overwhelmed him, darkness falling over his vision.
Beginning customization process.
When Shirone regained awareness, the damp laboratory was gone.
He stood in a mirrored room, staring at his naked reflection as numerous gauges appeared around him.

blocks.speaker: Voice
blocks.content: This space allows you to modify your physical form. Design your desired appearance and confirm when ready.
Looking through the options, Shirone noticed some were locked.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Premium content?
Glancing at categories like Gender Change, Mutations, and Monstrous Forms, Shirone made his decision.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Confirm. Leave it as is.
Unlike others, Shirone wasn't here to explore; his purpose was rooted in necessity.

blocks.speaker: Voice
blocks.content: Customization complete.
Darkness returned, followed by a surreal, dreamlike landscape.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Hehehe. Fight, fight.
Martin's voice echoed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone realized he was being dragged across the ground, unchained but tethered to something.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Immortality without the sun? A half-life. Destroy each other. Fight endlessly.
At the edge of a steep cliff, Martin yanked Shirone's leg and shouted.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: This is divine punishment!
The moment Shirone felt gravity take over, the simulation's haze lifted, and his senses returned.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huff... huff...
Gaining control of his body, Shirone steadied himself and gazed at the dizzying drop below.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's... really high.
If he fell unprepared, even his torso wouldn't survive intact.
-Activating AI program.
A mechanical voice echoed in his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh?
A blue overlay appeared on his vision, with augmented reality information flooding in.
-High Gear Level 1. Energy output initiated.
A surge of energy radiated from Shirone's chest, enveloping his entire body.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Whoa.
Though his newfound strength countered the fear, the fall's height still posed a deadly risk.
-Kinetic energy reduction mechanism activating.
The landscape lit up with red circles, highlighting optimal footholds and shifting probabilities in real-time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 61.7 percent.
Spotting a protruding rock, Shirone grabbed for it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Argh!
The impact felt like his arm would pop out of its socket, and the rock crumbled.
Shirone fell again.
Using the highlighted footholds, he gradually slowed his descent.
Boom!
Landing safely on the ground, he steadied himself.
-Location identified: Beginner Zone, Iron Haven.
Cold wind brushed past as he surveyed his surroundings—endless piles of scrap metal obscured his view.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: These are all weapons or armor?
An augmented reality scan revealed helmets, rifles, grenades—items unnecessary in Shirone's world.
Ratatatatata!
Gunfire echoed from beyond the scrap piles.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Looks like I need to gear up.
A notification pinged, displaying an envelope icon in his right eye.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: View.
Detailed information filled the display, offering insights he hadn't encountered during the tutorial.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hmm, there are three key user stats: AI Level, Engine Output Level, and Selective Options.
Being Level 1, Shirone had no bonuses in any category yet.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well, let's figure it out.
He scrounged through the scrap piles, equipping a worn helmet, a rifle, and a pistol, filling his belt with ammo.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The gear weighed over 10 kilograms, but it felt light.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: High gear...
With every cycle of the power unit replacing his heart, explosive energy coursed through him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And this is just Level 1? What happens when I reach top rank...?
A thrill coursed through him, pulling his lips into a grin.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright! Let's do this!
Tapping his helmet, Shirone strode confidently into the virtual world.
200 meters away.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: He's here. He's really here.
A long-haired man perched atop a scrap pile aimed his rifle at Shirone.
His Level 7 AI highlighted a code name over Shirone's figure: Yahweh2.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Oh, Platinum?

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Barebones bio gear, old helmet from the starting zone, and Platinum?

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: There was only one conclusion.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Heh.
To secure such a rare code name, someone must have brought in a nobody from the real world.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: What a catch.
Placing his finger on the trigger, his AI locked onto Shirone's helmet with pinpoint accuracy.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: The old helmet's great gear, but Level 7 AI calculates penetration rates, you see.
The reticle displayed a fixed 98% penetration probability.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Here we go.
He pulled the trigger.
At that moment, Shirone twisted his body, narrowly avoiding the bullet.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: H-how?
If Shirone's AI level were higher, he might've sensed the sniper earlier.

blocks.speaker: Man
blocks.content: Dodging a bullet with no assistance?
The man's wide eyes stared at the code name Yahweh2 glowing faintly above Shirone.
